snps.effect_template: 4q25 locus near PITX2. T allele significantly increases atrial fibrillation risk.
Second independent 4q25 variant for AF risk.

recommendation_template: Be aware of AF symptoms (irregular heartbeat, palpitations). Reduce modifiable risk factors: maintain healthy weight, limit alcohol, manage blood pressure.

studies.title: Variants in ZFHX3 and 4q25 are associated with atrial fibrillation
studies.finding: rs2200733 at 4q25 strongly associated with AF (OR=1.72)
